description: Multi-AZ 3-tier AWS architecture with Public, App, and Data subnets, ALB, EC2, and RDS
AWS Serverless API using Route53, WAF, API Gateway, Lambda handler, and DynamoDB
ECS Fargate services running behind ALB in private subnets with CloudWatch Monitoring
Event-driven architecture with EventBridge router, SQS queues, SNS topics, and Lambdas
Data ingestion and analytics pipeline using Kinesis streams, Lambda parser, S3, and Redshift
3-tier GCP architecture with Global HTTP Load Balancing, Compute Engine VMs, and Cloud SQL
GCP Serverless stack with Cloud Run microservices, Cloud Pub/Sub queue, and Cloud Firestore DB
GCP Data Analytics Lakehouse using Cloud Storage, Dataflow ETL, BigQuery, and Looker BI
Office LAN topology with Firewall, Core Switches, Access Switches, and VLANs
Network DMZ structure protecting internal services with External/Internal Firewalls
Relational ERD schema for E-Commerce: users, products, orders, order_items, and payments
Relational ERD schema for Subscription Billing: customers, subscriptions, invoices, and plans
PFD gas compression system with knock-out vessel, compressor, cooler, and separators
PFD copper processing circuit with crushing mill, flotation cells, and thickening tank
AWS EKS / GKE Kubernetes cluster architecture with pods, services, and ingress controller
